children.text: the use by the Department of Justice of the United States Marshals Service to assist jurisdictions in locating and apprehending sex offenders who fail to comply with sex offender registration requirements, as authorized by this chapter;

a detailed explanation of each jurisdiction’s compliance with subchapter I of this chapter;
